kpi_results.actual: All components have proper roles, labels, states, and keyboard navigation

definition_of_done_items.criterion: ContactCard component with avatar, status badge, actions
definition_of_done_items.evidence: ContactCard.tsx: role=article, aria-label, colored initials avatar, status badges, email/call actions with aria-labels

definition_of_done_items.criterion: ContactList component with DataTable, sorting, bulk actions
definition_of_done_items.evidence: ContactList.tsx: Uses DataTable from @intelliflow/ui, column definitions, loading skeleton, empty state, bulk email/export/delete

definition_of_done_items.criterion: ContactDetail component with Radix UI Tabs
definition_of_done_items.evidence: ContactDetail.tsx: 7 tabs (Overview, Activity, Deals, Tickets, Documents, Notes, AI Insights) using Tabs/TabsList/TabsTrigger/TabsContent
ContactForm.tsx: 3-step wizard (Personal, Company, Additional), Zod validation, error summary with focus management, aria-invalid, aria-describedby

definition_of_done_items.criterion: ActivityTimeline with filters and infinite scroll
definition_of_done_items.evidence: ActivityTimeline.tsx: radiogroup filters, search input, expandable details, IntersectionObserver infinite scroll, aria-live result count
RelationshipGraph.tsx: Linked account/lead/contacts, opportunity/task counts, empty state, descriptive link text
All 103 tests passing: ContactCard(14), ContactList(14), ContactDetail(19), ContactForm(24), ActivityTimeline(19), RelationshipGraph(13)
93% overall line coverage. Individual: ActivityTimeline 98%, ContactCard 100%, RelationshipGraph 100%, ContactList 93.5%, ContactDetail 89.3%, ContactForm 88.9%

invariants_acknowledged: Hexagonal architecture: domain layer has no infrastructure dependencies
All UI components use shadcn/ui from @intelliflow/ui

notes: PG-133 Contact List & Detail Pages: Created 6 React components (ContactCard, ContactList, ContactDetail, ContactForm, ActivityTimeline, RelationshipGraph) with full WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility. ContactDetail uses Radix UI Tabs (BLOCKER fix). ContactForm implements 3-step wizard with Zod validation. ActivityTimeline has infinite scroll via IntersectionObserver. 103/103 tests passing, 93% line coverage. Page refactoring deferred to avoid breaking existing functionality.
